---
title: "Teaching"
description-meta: "Teaching activities of Sivalingam S M"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

::: {.academic-teaching}

::: {.teaching-header}

<div class="teaching-label"> </div>

# Courses & Teaching

<!-- <p class="teaching-summary">
Teaching activities and areas of interest in mathematics,
statistics, scientific computing, and dynamical systems.
</p> -->

<!-- ::: -->


::: {.teaching-section}

<div class="teaching-label"> </div>

<!-- ## Teaching Experience -->

::: {.course-list}

<div class="course-item">

<div class="course-code">
MA1001
</div>

<div class="course-content">

<h3>Probability and Statistics</h3>

<div class="course-meta">
<span>2022–2023</span>
<span>B.Tech ECE</span>
</div>

<p>
National Institute of Technology Puducherry
</p>

</div>

</div>


<div class="course-item">

<div class="course-code">
MA222
</div>

<div class="course-content">

<h3>Probability and Random Processes</h3>

<div class="course-meta">
<span>2023–2024</span>
<span>B.Tech ECE</span>
</div>

<p>
National Institute of Technology Puducherry
</p>

</div>

</div>

:::

<!-- :::


::: {.teaching-section}

<div class="teaching-label"> </div>

## Courses of Interest

::: {.teaching-interest-grid}

<div class="teaching-interest">
<span>01</span>
<strong>Scientific Machine Learning</strong>
</div>

<div class="teaching-interest">
<span>02</span>
<strong>Dynamical Systems</strong>
</div>

<div class="teaching-interest">
<span>03</span>
<strong>Neural Differential Equations</strong>
</div>

<div class="teaching-interest">
<span>04</span>
<strong>Numerical Methods</strong>
</div>

<div class="teaching-interest">
<span>05</span>
<strong>Probability and Statistics</strong>
</div>

<div class="teaching-interest">
<span>06</span>
<strong>Stochastic Processes</strong>
</div>

<div class="teaching-interest">
<span>07</span>
<strong>Regression Analysis and GLM</strong>
</div>

<div class="teaching-interest">
<span>08</span>
<strong>Mathematical Modelling</strong>
</div>

<div class="teaching-interest">
<span>09</span>
<strong>Control Theory</strong>
</div>

:::

:::

:::  -->
